series_metadata.series_description: Documents that summarize the results of in-depth research efforts on a particular information technology topic or topics. These reports and studies may be formally published on the Ohio.gov site and/or may be circulated to other agencies and/or DAS divisions.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Upon publication, send copy State Lilbrary. in office area it is superseded, obsolete or rescinded ; Paper: Upon publication, send copy State Lilbrary. in office area it is superseded, obsolete or rescinded
